pages_preview.text_preview: Welcome to SCORE! We’re excited for you to get started
Onboarding Outline ❖ Overview of SCORE ❖ Timeline & process ❖ OSF project ❖ COS involvement ❖ Your next steps

SCORE Mission ❖ Assess and improve the credibility of social and behavioral science research ➢ Generate confidence scores for use by non-experts (e.g., researchers in other fields, funders, policy makers) ❖ For more information about SCORE, visit https://www.cos.io/score or read our 2019 press release

Confidentiality ❖ Please do not publicly share which studies you work on until all SCORE results are made public ➢ TA2 and TA3 teams must remain blind to which claims we’re replicating/reproducing to preserve the integrity of their predictions ➢ While we encourage you to participate in TA2 efforts to predict the credibility of claims, please do not participate in these efforts for any papers you work on

Project Types ❖ Four types of projects available to conduct in Phase 2 of SCORE: ➢ Replication ➢ Generalizability ➢ Reproduction ➢ Robustness ❖ See SCORE Project Types for a definition of each project type ➢ In general, SCORE will conduct the power analysis for replications, but labs are responsible for conducting their own power analysis for generalizability studies
